entries.name: Portal Companion Cube
entries.description: Portal Weighted Companion Cube — light-gray cube with pink hearts on each face and steel edge bars.

entries.name: Pac-Man Ghost
entries.description: Blinky — the classic red Pac-Man ghost — as a standalone 3D figurine. Smooth revolve profile gives the iconic teardrop silhouette, with white 3D oval eyes, blue pupils looking left, and four scalloped hem teeth.

entries.name: Castle Tower
entries.description: A grand medieval castle tower with a battered base, 8-merlon battlements, gothic arched door, arrow-slit windows, and a deep blue conical roof — voronoi stone texture applied in-browser for a carved-stone look.

entries.name: Heraldic Shield
entries.description: A knight's shield quartered in red, blue, gold, and silver with a central gold boss.

entries.name: Treasure Chest
entries.description: A pirate treasure chest with a dark walnut dome lid, bold brass strap hardware, gold corner caps and ball feet, and a raised lock plate with keyhole — woven wood-grain texture applied in-browser.

entries.name: Chess King
entries.description: Turned ivory chess king with a tiered base, crown collar, and cross finial.

entries.name: Royal Crown
entries.description: A regal crown with tall two-section gold spires, deep crimson velvet inner band, ruby/sapphire/emerald/amethyst cabochon gems in gold bezels, accent beads, and a hammered-metal knurl texture on the band.

entries.name: Arcade Cabinet
entries.description: A vibrant upright arcade cabinet — deep-blue body with a red side panel, a gold marquee, a pixel-art space invader glowing on the screen, a joystick, and colorful buttons.

entries.name: Cassette Tape
entries.description: Retro audio cassette with reel windows and a cream label strip.

entries.name: Handheld Console
entries.description: Game Boy-style handheld with a green screen, D-pad, action buttons, and speaker grille.

entries.name: Boombox
entries.description: 80s boombox with twin speaker grilles, a cassette deck, control buttons, and a carry handle.

entries.name: Low-Poly Fox
entries.description: A stylized low-poly fox with a pointed snout, triangular ears, bushy tail, and dark leg socks.

entries.name: Lighthouse
entries.description: A striped lighthouse with red and white bands, a glass lamp room, and a black dome cap.

entries.name: Hot Air Balloon
entries.description: A colorful balloon with alternating red, yellow, and blue gores and a basket hanging below.

entries.name: D20 Die
entries.description: A 20-sided polyhedral die built via icosahedron hull, with raised gold 7-segment numerals on all 20 faces (opposite faces sum to 21) on a deep midnight-blue body.

entries.name: Toadstool Mushroom
entries.description: A red toadstool with white polka-dot spots painted as smooth rounded patches using the paintStroke brush.

entries.name: Twisted Vase
entries.description: Stacked rotated rings forming a hex-faceted twisted profile.

entries.name: Christmas Tree
entries.description: Low-poly tiered tree with a stellated octahedron star on top.

entries.name: Chess Rook
entries.description: Hollow chess rook with crenellations cut from the parapet.

entries.name: OpenSCAD: Twisted
entries.description: Twisted star column via OpenSCAD's linear_extrude.

entries.name: Retro Rocket
entries.description: Classic retro rocket with ogive nose cone, fins, porthole window, and thrust nozzle.

entries.name: Spiral Staircase
entries.description: A 16-step helical staircase with a dark stone column, alternating walnut treads, brass railing posts, a top landing, and a circular baluster ring — voronoi stone, woven wood-grain, and knurl brass textures applied in-browser.

entries.name: Geodesic Lantern
entries.description: A tall antique dome lantern with a 16-segment faceted geodesic shell, two rings of six amber-glowing circular windows, a raised bronze banding ring, a hexagonal base, and a gold finial spire.

entries.name: Wall Clock Face
entries.description: 100mm-diameter clock face with 12 hour markers, 60 minute ticks, and tapered hour + minute hands posed at 10:10. Built with the circularPattern radius shortcut.

entries.name: Honeycomb Planter
entries.description: A cylindrical planter pot with a staggered honeycomb pattern carved through its wall. Built with nested linearPattern + circularPattern and the expectUnion connectivity check.

entries.name: Wind Turbine
entries.description: A tapered tower with a nacelle, hub, and 3 swept blades — plus a service ladder up the tower face. Showcases placeOn for the nacelle and circularPattern with a non-Z axis for the rotor.

entries.name: Hex Bolt & Nut Set
entries.description: M16x3 hex bolt, matching nut, and washer laid out side-by-side. Showcases BOSL2's screw() and nut() — real threaded geometry that manifold-js can't easily reproduce.

entries.name: Spur Gear Pair
entries.description: Two meshing involute spur gears on a rounded base plate, with tooth offset so they interlock correctly. Built with BOSL2's spur_gear() and gear_dist().

entries.name: Pipe Tee Fitting
entries.description: A 3-way plumbing tee fitting with flared collars and a connected interior cavity. Built with BOSL2's xcyl()/zcyl() axis-aligned cylinders and cyl(chamfer1=) for the flared collar edges.

entries.name: Modular Drawer Bin
entries.description: A stackable storage bin with two compartments, rounded corners, and stacking lugs. Built with BOSL2's cuboid(rounding=) for filleted edges, plus translate-and-anchor cyl() placement for the lugs.

entries.name: SDF Organic Creature
entries.description: A smooth-blended creature built entirely from SDF primitives — showcases smoothUnion for organic body welds and paint-by-label colourisation of an SDF model.
entries.printTestedNote: Printed successfully — the smooth-blended SDF body comes off the bed clean.

entries.name: SDF Gyroid Chamber
entries.description: A triply-periodic gyroid lattice clipped inside a solid frame — the SDF way to do 3D-printable infill in one expression.

entries.name: SDF Twisted Vessel
entries.description: A hollow twisted ceramic vase with a fluted, spiralled belly, a pinched neck, an open mouth, and a warm gold rim band over a deep-teal glaze.

entries.name: SDF + Manifold Mechanical Part
entries.description: A mechanical part that mixes smooth-blended SDF features (grip, fillets) with crisp Manifold CSG (mounting plate, drilled holes) — shows how the two engines compose.

entries.name: SDF Bloom
entries.description: A stylised flower showcasing the SDF combinators — ellipsoid petals fanned out with polarArray (no hand-written coordinates), a flattened pollen centre, and a taper-narrowed stem. Three painted regions.

entries.name: Smiley Cactus
entries.description: A cheerful potted saguaro with two upraised arms, a big grinning face, and a pink flower bud on its crown — sitting in a terracotta pot.

entries.name: Studio Microphone
entries.description: Classic large-diaphragm studio condenser microphone cradled in a U-shaped shock-mount yoke on a weighted desktop stand, with a coiled cable looping back to the base.

entries.name: Vintage Biplane
entries.description: A WW1-era biplane with stacked canvas wings, a tapered fuselage, a yellow engine cowling, a two-blade wooden propeller, and a swept tail fin.

entries.name: Pipe Flange
entries.description: An ANSI-style pipe flange with a 6-bolt circle, central bore, chamfered face, and beveled neck — showcasing BREP's exact selective edge filleting on a mechanically realistic part.

entries.name: Machine Tool Knob
entries.description: A precision machine-tool grip knob with a finger-grip skirt, chamfered top, domed crown, and a shaft bore — showcasing BREP's exact chamfers and fillets on rotational geometry.

entries.name: Butt Hinge
entries.description: A classic interlocking butt hinge: two flat leaves, three knuckles, and a continuous pin — showcasing BREP's exact cylindrical surfaces and clean selective fillets.

entries.name: V-Groove Pulley
entries.description: A precision V-belt pulley wheel with a beveled drive groove around its circumference, a central hub bore, and chamfered side rims — showcasing BREP's exact rotational geometry and angled surfaces.

entries.name: Precision L-Bracket
entries.description: A right-angle steel bracket with a large concave fillet on the inside web, rounded outer tip edges, and four mounting holes — showcasing BREP's exact selective edge rounding.

entries.name: Project Enclosure
entries.description: A rectangular electronics-project enclosure shell with rounded outer corners, an inset lid lip, PCB mounting bosses, and side ventilation slots — showcasing BREP's exact filleted shells.

entries.name: Robot Buddy
entries.description: A friendly retro robot with a rounded head, two big cyan eyes, a bobble antenna, a chest panel, and stubby arms — a colorful filleted BREP showcase.

entries.name: Bird Feeder
entries.description: A gazebo-style hanging bird feeder with conical wood roof, revolved seed reservoir, lipped dish, and circular perches — showcasing revolve + circularPattern + paint.

entries.name: Vintage Camera
entries.description: A vintage rangefinder camera with a tapered lens barrel, viewfinder, shutter button, and film advance — colorful BREP showcase with paint.

entries.name: Coastal Lighthouse
entries.description: A tall round lighthouse with red-and-white tower stripes, balcony railing, domed lantern, and conical cap — colorful BREP showcase with paint.

entries.name: Coffee Mug
entries.description: A white ceramic coffee mug with a colored rim band, painted coffee inside, and a curved torus handle — showcasing BREP's shell op + paint.

entries.name: SDF TPMS Study
entries.description: Four 14³ lattice tiles side-by-side on a plinth — Schwarz P, Diamond, Lidinoid, and a gradedGyroid with a diagonal thickness ramp. The exhaustive TPMS comparison; five painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Aetherjelly
entries.description: An ethereal bioluminescent jellyfish — a cyan-to-violet gradient bell with a ruffled rim, seven flowing tentacles tipped with glowing pods, and a ring of luminous ocelli. An SDF combinator showcase.

entries.name: SDF Helix Lamp Standard
entries.description: A warm helix lamp — a four-turn amber coil spiralling up from a dark base to a glowing bulb finial, built from a chain of SDF capsules along a helical path.

entries.name: SDF 28-Tooth Spur Wheel
entries.description: A spur/turbine wheel — single tooth (roundedBox + taper) folded 28-fold via polarRepeat, plus a 6-hole polarArray lightening web and a bored central hub. The canonical "polarArray for low counts, polarRepeat for high" showcase, in three painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Perforated Faceplate
entries.description: A speaker-style faceplate built on the finite-count repeatN combinator — a 7×5 grid of through-holes subtracted from a rounded slab, a recessed bezel, and a 4×1 row of LED-indicator bumps. The textbook "no intersect needed" case in three painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Graded TPMS Study
entries.description: A femur-inspired model exercising all three new graded TPMS variants: gradedSchwarzP for the cortical shaft (radial density), gradedDiamond for the marrow canal (axial trabecular grading), and gradedLidinoid for the femoral head (spherical-radial). Five painted regions.

entries.name: SDF Running-Bond Brick Wall
entries.description: A classic running-bond brick wall — bricks tiled via repeatN({stagger: {along: x, by: y}}), the new option for brick/honeycomb patterns. Every other course shifts by half a brick. Two painted regions on a recessed mortar slab.

entries.name: Striped Lighthouse
entries.description: A parametric tapered lighthouse with alternating red/white bands, a railed gallery, and a domed lantern room glowing around a central light.

entries.name: Parametric Storage Tray
entries.description: Customizable rounded storage tray — adjust size, wall/floor thickness, corner style, and internal dividers via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Parametric Control Knob
entries.description: Customizable control knob/dial — set diameter, height, grip count and style (knurled/fluted/smooth), center bore, and pointer via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Parametric Vent Panel
entries.description: Customizable perforated honeycomb/vent panel — set size, thickness, cell size/shape (hex/square/round), wall, and an optional border frame via the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Daisy Flower
entries.description: A cheerful parametric daisy with a domed pollen center, a fan of radial petals, a tapering stem, and a pair of leaves.

entries.name: Rainbow Ring Stacker
entries.description: A parametric take on the classic children's stacking toy: a domed base, a tapered center post, and a free-sliding stack of rainbow donut rings of decreasing size.

entries.name: Rocket Ship
entries.description: A retro toy rocket with a parametric body, nose cone, ring of tail fins, a round porthole window, and a flared exhaust nozzle.

entries.name: Toadstool Mushroom
entries.description: A storybook Amanita toadstool with a flared, spotted red cap on a rounded cream stem, fully parametric from cap size to spot count.

entries.name: Traffic Light
entries.description: A parametric three-lamp traffic signal with red, amber, and green lenses recessed into a rounded housing, plus optional sun visors and a mounting post.

entries.name: Layer Cake
entries.description: A self-coloring parametric layer cake: colors live in the model code via api.label(shape, name, { color }), so it renders painted with no paint step and the editor stays editable. Set the frosting color and tier count in the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Country Manor Estate
entries.description: A symmetric Palladian-style country manor with projecting end wings, a columned entrance portico, grand pediment and crest, hipped roofs ringed by balustrades, dormer windows, clustered chimneys with clay pots, and a central rooftop cupola — self-colored via labeled regions for multi-color prints.
entries.printTestedNote: Printed and the quality comes out really cleanly — the labeled regions separate crisply for a multi-color print.

entries.name: Parameterized Chain
entries.description: A print-in-place interlocking chain swept with Curves.sweep — a 5-link straight run and a 30-link Archimedean spiral laid flat on the bed. Set link count, scale, wire diameter, and clearance in the Parameters panel.

entries.name: Hot Dog
entries.description: A cartoon hot dog — a hull-formed sausage nestled in a hollowed bun with a wavy mustard squiggle draped on top. Fully parametric, with color knobs for bun, sausage, and mustard.

entries.name: Voxel Castle
entries.description: A grand royal castle built on a voxel grid — concentric curtain walls, corner turrets with blue conical roofs, a moat, gardens, and golden banners. Painted block-by-block, then baked to a watertight mesh.

entries.name: Voxel Robot
entries.description: A boxy retro voxel robot with glowing cyan eyes, a button-panel chest, blocky arms, and a bobble antenna.

entries.name: Voxel Dragon
entries.description: A cute seated voxel dragon with emerald scales, a cream belly, bone horns, a row of dorsal spikes, and a curling tail.

entries.name: Voxel Cat
entries.description: A charming voxel tabby sitting up — rounded head with pointy ears, green eyes, a pink nose, white paws, and a curling tail.

entries.name: Voxel Slime
entries.description: A classic RPG-style voxel slime — a glossy aqua blob with a sheen highlight and a big happy face.

entries.name: Voxel Knight
entries.description: A chibi voxel knight in steel plate with gold trim, a red plume, a cross-emblem shield, and a raised sword.

entries.name: Medieval Watchtower
entries.description: A detailed stone watchtower with buttresses, corbels, open battlements, an arched wooden door, and a conical roof — self-colored via labeled regions for multi-color prints.

entries.name: Retro TV
entries.description: A retro CRT television with a lofted tapered housing, a curved-glass screen, a swept carry handle, round control knobs, and rabbit-ear antennas.

entries.name: Japanese Pagoda
entries.description: A five-story vermilion-and-white temple pagoda whose dark tiled roofs sweep up into graceful upturned eaves, crowned by a gilt-bronze sōrin spire atop a stepped stone base.

entries.name: Steampunk Airship
entries.description: A crimson-silk dirigible with a brass-ribbed envelope, a wooden gondola lined with brass portholes, a verdigris-copper wheelhouse, cruciform tail fins, and an outrigger propeller.

entries.name: Mechanical Orrery
entries.description: A brass tabletop orrery whose meshing involute gear train drives a gilded sun, with red, blue, and ringed teal planets swinging out on graceful arms at staggered orbits.

entries.name: Pocket Watch Movement
entries.description: An open-face skeleton pocket watch laid bare — a stepped brass bezel with a fluted crown and suspension bow framing an exposed train of involute spur gears down to a blued balance, jeweled with red rubies at every pivot.

entries.name: Turbofan Jet Engine
entries.description: The front of a high-bypass airliner turbofan: a smoothly swept nacelle cowl with a chamfered intake lip, a dark spinner cone, and a full ring of fan blades — an exact-surface BREP showcase.

entries.name: Kitchen Faucet
entries.description: A sleek brushed-metal gooseneck mixer tap, its tall toroidal spout arching from a flared deck column down to a flush aerator, with a single blue lever handle at the bend — a smooth-surface BREP showcase.

entries.name: Voxel Pirate Ship
entries.description: A blocky pirate galleon — a curved wooden hull with a red gold-windowed stern castle, three masts of billowing cream sails, a crow's nest, iron cannons, a gilded figurehead, and a skull-and-crossbones flag.

entries.name: Voxel Steam Locomotive
entries.description: A cute blocky 4-4-0 steam engine — a green brass-banded boiler, a flared funnel trailing a white smoke puff, twin steam domes, a windowed wood cab, big red driving wheels linked by silver rods, and a cowcatcher.

entries.name: Spiral Fidget Cone
entries.description: Print-in-place bolt & nut — a 5-start helical screw captive inside a matching spiral-cage cone. Twist and it rides the threads; prints in one piece and unscrews apart.
entries.printTestedNote: Printed and works as a fidget, but the surface finish is coarser than a hand-modeled fidget you'd download — good, not premium.

entries.name: DNA Double Helix
entries.description: A double-helix model of DNA — two antiparallel sugar-phosphate backbones (orange and teal beads) spiralling around a shared axis, joined by colored base-pair rungs in the four nucleotide colors. Self-colored via labeled regions; parametric turns, radius, pitch, and bead density.

entries.name: Fountain Pen
entries.description: A capped-and-posted fountain pen — gold nib, black grip, burgundy barrel with gold trim bands, a posted cap with finial, and a sprung pocket clip. A turned object composed from stacked tapered cylinders along one axis, self-colored via labeled regions. Color and length are parametric.

entries.name: Ringed Planet
entries.description: A gas giant with eight vivid Jupiter-style latitude bands, a five-band Saturn-inspired ring system with Cassini gap, a raised Great Red Spot, and a 22° axial tilt.

entries.name: Captive-Nut Tightening Knob
entries.description: A knurled hand knob with a captive M4 hex-nut pocket and a clearance bore — trap a nut and turn it onto any M4 bolt or rod. Useful for jigs, clamps, and adjustable feet. Built with api.fasteners.

entries.name: Electronics Project Box
entries.description: A parametric base tray with lid-mount bosses, a matching countersunk-screwed lid, and vent slots to keep electronics cool. Pick the mounting style: heat-set insert bosses or thread-forming pilot bores the screws bite into directly. Built with api.fasteners.

entries.name: Dovetail Rail System
entries.description: A wall-mount plate with a full-length dovetail rail and a matching hook that slides on and locks — lift to remove. Print one plate, print as many hooks as you need. Both parts parameterizable. Built with api.joints and api.fasteners.

entries.name: Print-in-Place Hinge
entries.description: A barrel hinge that prints lying open flat and works straight off the bed — one leaf carries an integral captive pin, the other's bored knuckles wrap it. Knuckle count, pin size, and clearance are parametric. Built with api.joints.hinge.

entries.name: Ball-and-Socket Mount
entries.description: An articulating ball-and-socket mount that holds the angle you set it to — pick a retention mode: friction (default; springy fingers grip the ball), clamp (a screw-tightened pinch), or snap (free-swivel). Both halves stand on screw-down plates and ball size, grip, and slots are parametric. Built with api.joints.ballSocket.

entries.name: Snap-Lid Box
entries.description: A round container whose press-on lid clicks shut — a bead ring on the lid skirt snaps into a groove inside the box mouth, both from one api.joints.snapRim call so they share the exact interface diameter.

entries.name: SDF Asteroid
entries.description: A craggy asteroid — a sphere pushed in and out by an fBm noise field via the new sdf.noise() + node.displace(). One watertight rock; smooth (non-ridged) noise keeps it a single piece.

entries.name: SDF Bark Vase
entries.description: A hollow vase textured with vertical bark grooves — ridged noise carved inward-only with node.displace() so the thin wall stays one piece. Shows shaping a noise field to one side to avoid floating islands.

entries.name: SDF Brain Coral
entries.description: A boulder scored with winding labyrinthine grooves — inward-only ridged-noise displacement gives the brain-coral pattern in one watertight solid.

entries.name: L-System Fern
entries.description: The textbook Lindenmayer plant grammar grown into printable 3D geometry via the new api.sdf.lsystem() — a flat fractal fern of welded capsules.

entries.name: L-System Coral
entries.description: A chunky branching coral grown from an L-system — four-way radial splits with smooth-blended (fleshy) joints via api.sdf.lsystem({ blend }).

entries.name: L-System Tree
entries.description: A stylized tree grown from an L-system: a trunk with a radial branch crown and a canopy of leaf spheres, in two painted regions (wood + leaves) from one call.

entries.name: Voxel SDF Gyroid Vase
entries.description: A desktop pen & brush holder with an open gyroid-lattice wall welded between a solid base and rim — one SDF expression (gyroid intersected with a tube) rasterized into voxels with v.sdf. Two-tone teal body and gold trim.

entries.name: Voxel SDF Coral
entries.description: A porous brain-coral on a sandy rock base — a smooth-blended SDF blob (smoothUnion of ellipsoids) made knobby and holey by a diamond TPMS, then rasterized into voxels with v.sdf. The organic SDF-to-voxel showcase.

entries.name: Voxel SDF Blob Mascot
entries.description: A cute mint-green blob mascot built entirely from SDF smooth-blends (smoothUnion of ellipsoids, flat-bottomed by a half-space clip) and rasterized into voxels with v.sdf — organic character modeling in the blocky voxel world.

entries.name: Voxel SDF Lattice Cube
entries.description: A graphite desk paperweight whose four windows reveal a glowing-cyan Schwarz-P TPMS lattice core — frame, window cuts, and lattice are one SDF expression rasterized into voxels with v.sdf.

entries.name: Voxel SDF Twist Tower
entries.description: A twisted pen & utensil holder — a hollow rounded-square wall punched with a grid of windows and twisted on its axis, then rasterized into voxels with v.sdf. Solid flat base, lavender rim, violet body.

entries.name: Parametric Gear Pair
entries.description: Meshing involute spur-gear pair with adjustable module, tooth counts (ratio), thickness, and shaft bore.

entries.name: Screw-Top Jar
entries.description: Watertight container with a matching threaded screw-on lid — real external + internal threads, fully parametric (diameter, height, pitch, fit).

entries.name: Rack & Pinion
entries.description: Involute pinion meshing a straight rack to turn rotation into linear motion — adjustable module, teeth, and length.

entries.name: Waving Kid
entries.description: A cheerful stylized child waving hello — one arm raised high, eyes glancing up at the person they're greeting, chunky cargo pants, long hair, built with the SDF figure rig.

entries.name: Sneakers Character
entries.description: A casual figure in chunky sneakers — showcasing the figure footwear builder: F.clothing.shoes paints a separate contrasting sole and F.ground plants both feet level on the base so the soles sit flush.

entries.name: Afro Funk Dancer
entries.description: A funk dancer mid-groove with a big curly afro — showing off the figure rig's hair system, where the 'afro' style and its curl relief are real printable geometry that tracks the cocked head.

entries.name: Sumo Wrestler
entries.description: A sumo wrestler in a wide pre-bout crouch, arms spread — the figure rig's weight axis (maxed) plus a stocky male build give the heavy belly and bulk, finished with a navy mawashi and a topknot.

entries.name: Yoga Tree Pose
entries.description: A woman balancing in vrikshasana (tree pose) — one foot tucked to the standing thigh, palms together overhead — in a sports bra and leggings, showing the figure rig's female silhouette.

entries.name: Opera Diva
entries.description: A glamorous opera singer mid-aria in a floor-length gown, one arm flung overhead — the figure rig's female axis with added weight for a fuller figure, plus painted lips and an updo.

entries.name: Cornrows Runner
entries.description: A sprinter set at the blocks — cornrows laid tight to the scalp with carved partings, a round face with a broad nose and full lips, deep skin. Shows the figure rig's face-shape, nose, and hair-texture axes.

entries.name: Pool Swimmer
entries.description: A lean swimmer in low-rise trunks, standing relaxed — shows the figure rig's bare-torso anatomy: subtly placed nipples on the chest and a navel on the midriff, both derived from the rig's surface landmarks.

entries.name: Chibi Wizard
entries.description: An adorable chibi wizard with an oversized pointed hat, a magic staff topped by a glowing orb, and a long beard — extreme cute proportions.

entries.name: Warrior Pose
entries.description: A figure in a yoga warrior lunge — front knee bent, back leg straight, arms outstretched in a T — showing off the figure rig's leg posing.

entries.name: Ballerina
entries.description: An elegant ballerina with arms raised overhead and a layered tutu, balanced on a base — a graceful figure-rig pose.

entries.name: Karate Master
entries.description: A martial artist mid-punch in a white gi with a knotted black belt and red headband — front stance, chambered fist, gritted teeth.

entries.name: Waving Princess
entries.description: A princess in a floor-length gown giving a royal wave — gold five-point crown, ponytail, painted lips, a demure sidelong glance, open-fingered hand.

entries.name: Topknot Sensei
entries.description: A calm tai-chi master with palms pressed at the chest — anatomical detailed ears (helix rim, concha, lobe) framed by a topknot bun worn behind them.

entries.name: Pixie Skater
entries.description: A breezy skater, hands on hips, with a cropped pixie cut worn behind the ears showing clean round ears.

entries.name: Superhero Takeoff
entries.description: A stocky hero launching skyward with one fist punched up — sweeping cape, chest emblem, gloves and boots over a two-tone suit.

entries.name: Project Box / Enclosure
entries.description: A fully parametric two-part project box built with api.enclosure — choose a lip-nesting or screw-down lid, then tune size, wall, corner radius, fit, and screw size in the Customizer. The screw lid composes api.fasteners for its tapped corner bosses and countersunk holes.

entries.name: Knurled Control Knob
entries.description: A customizable control knob with a functional knurled grip built with api.knurl — switch between a diamond cross-hatch, straight splines, or finger ribs, and mount it on a plain shaft, a D-shaft, or a heat-set threaded insert. Pointer notch optional.

entries.name: Muscular Hero
entries.description: A bodybuilder in a relaxed front stance — defined pectorals, abs, lats, biceps and quads from the figure rig's muscle axis (muscle: 0.85), with high-cut competition trunks.

entries.name: Athletic Sprinter
entries.description: A lean, toned sprinter in a ready stance — the muscle axis (0.55) composed with a slim female silhouette gives athletic definition without bulk, in a crop top, track briefs and running shoes.

entries.name: Tai Chi Master
entries.description: An elderly tai chi master balanced in the 'white crane spreads its wings' pose — one leg lifted, palms open — with a roman nose, serene half-lids, a grey topknot, and a bare open-robe chest with navel.

entries.name: Lotus Meditation Yogi
entries.description: A meditator seated in full cross-legged lotus, palms resting on the knees with eyes closed — bald and bare-chested with a navel, a calm seated study of the figure rig's deep-fold pose.

entries.name: Rock Climber
entries.description: An athletic woman mid-climb, both arms reaching for holds in a stepped crouch and gaze up — a square jaw, box braids, athletic top and climbing shoes.

entries.name: Sprinter at the Blocks
entries.description: A muscular sprinter driving out of a crouched start, bare-chested to show the muscle axis — a broad nose, short coily fade and track spikes.

entries.name: Grand Jeté Dancer
entries.description: A ballet dancer caught mid-air in a grand jeté — legs split front and back, arms swept open — in a leotard with a streaming ponytail and pointed feet.

entries.name: Runway Fashion Model
entries.description: A statuesque fashion model mid-strut, hand on hip and head turned with a confident side gaze — tall elegant proportions, high cheekbones, full lips and a floor-length gown.

entries.name: Boxer in Guard
entries.description: A stocky, heavily-muscled boxer in a tight guard with both fists up by the face — a square jaw and flattened nose, bare-chested in trunks and boots.

entries.name: Basketball Dunk
entries.description: A leaping athlete airborne for a dunk, one arm palming the ball overhead and gaze up at the rim — a tall lean physique in a sleeveless jersey and basketball shoes.

entries.name: Expectant Mother
entries.description: A serene expectant mother in a long-sleeve maternity dress that drapes over the rounded bump, arms relaxed at her sides — long hair, on a display base.

entries.name: Cheerleader Jump
entries.description: A cheerleader caught in a mid-air star jump, arms up in a V with pom-poms and a big open toothy smile — a cropped top, pleated skirt and a high ponytail.

entries.name: Surfer
entries.description: A tanned surfer in a low riding crouch on a surfboard, arms flung wide for balance with a sun-squint and a relaxed grin — bare-chested in board shorts.

entries.name: Ballet Danseur
entries.description: A male ballet dancer in a turning port de bras, one arm curved overhead and the other extended — bare-chested in tights, a counterpoint to the ballerina.

entries.name: Cactus Dock
entries.description: A saguaro cactus desk dock — fluted trunk and two arms whose vertical ribs flow continuously around the bends, set in a tan pot. Built with the directional-surface primitive api.sdf.tube.

entries.name: Unicorn Horn
entries.description: A golden spiral unicorn horn — a double-helix groove tightening up a tapering, gently curved path. Shows api.sdf.tube's helix profile with taper.

entries.name: Vacuum Hose Elbow
entries.description: A corrugated vacuum-hose elbow — ring ridges that stay evenly spaced as the hose turns a 90° bend. Shows api.sdf.tube's rings profile following a path.

entries.name: Knight
entries.description: A knight in steel plate — showcases the figure accessory system: a worn cuirass with pauldrons, a belt, a sword held in the fist, and a scabbard hung at the hip.

entries.name: Lumberjack
entries.description: A bearded lumberjack in red flannel holding an axe ready to strike — built with the F.grasp + `holds: 'up'` AI-first-try grasping API.

entries.name: Scholar
entries.description: A bespectacled scholar in a long coat — showcases perched eyeglasses on the face, a wide-brim hat seated on the hair, and a belt at the waist.

entries.name: Noble Lady
entries.description: A poised noblewoman in a fitted gown — showcases in-code makeup (blush, lipstick, eyeshadow) and a gold necklace that hugs the neck and drapes a pendant down the chest.

entries.name: Tabby Cat
entries.description: A cute chibi tabby cat with big eyes and procedural mackerel stripes — customizable pose, build, ears, tail, and coat pattern (tabby, calico, spotted, siamese).

entries.name: Calico Cat
entries.description: A chibi calico cat — cream, orange, and dark-brown patches from a procedural colorway. Customizable pose, build, ears, tail, and coat pattern.

entries.name: Siamese Cat
entries.description: A chibi seal-point siamese cat with blue eyes and dark points on the ears, face mask, paws, and tail. Customizable pose, build, ears, tail, and coat pattern.

entries.name: Brindle Pup
entries.description: A cute chibi puppy with floppy ears and a procedural brindle (tiger-striped) coat over fawn. Customizable pose, build, ears, tail, and coat pattern (brindle, merle, dalmatian spots).

entries.name: Dalmatian Pup
entries.description: A chibi dalmatian puppy — procedural black spots on a white coat, with amber eyes. Customizable pose, build, ears, tail, and coat pattern.

entries.name: Dummy 13 — Complete Kit
entries.description: Everything for one of soozafone's Dummy 13 articulated figures (CC-BY-4.0) in a single part list: all 21 frame types + all 16 armor types, each part carrying its print quantity as components (58 pieces total — 2x limbs, 4x joint bridges, all three hand styles, adapter stand, full armor). Reverse-engineered into parametric code and verified against the original STLs to mean 0.005mm chamfer, three armor parts bit-exact.

entries.name: 3DBenchy (Inverse-CAD Reconstruction)
entries.description: The classic 3DBenchy print-torture-test boat (© Creative Tools, CC BY-ND 4.0), reverse-engineered from its STL into code by the inverse-CAD loop — verified against the original mesh to 0.013mm mean deviation, 0.16mm worst point, volume IoU 0.996, genus 5 exact. First non-native model the framework converged.
